{{Quote|Very well. New plan. I go and kill your wingman, and then we take you and your two X-wings back to Iron Fist. Right now.|Todrin Rossik to Gara Pethotel|<ref name="Iron Fist" />}}
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Todrin Rossik''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] who served in the forces of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]. He was a rail-thin and blond-haired. Rossik was assigned to accompany [[Tavin Notsil]] when he met with [[Gara Petothel]] on [[Aldivy]].

During their meeting, Rossik discovered that Petothel's escort, [[Myn Donos]], was lurking outside the house where the meeting took place. He was fairly certain that the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] had holos of him in their records, and decided to [[Death/Legends|kill]] Donos and take Petothel back to [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']]. Instead, Petothel signaled her partner to indicate trouble.

Donos took out Notsil with a [[Sniper/Legends|sniper shot]], and Petothel killed Rossik with her [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]].
